login.access_your_portal: Access your portal to manage your account and settings.

errors.user_not_found: No account found with this email address.
errors.password_not_set: Your account has not been activated yet. Please contact your administrator to set a password.

register.page_description: Join the Crystal Kairos community and grow your wealth today

interests.interests_description: Select all the services you are interested in. Select all that apply.

assumptions.title: Assumptions Checklist
assumptions.description: Please read and confirm the following to ensure you meet our membership criteria.
assumptions.assumption_1: I confirm that all information provided is accurate and I am joining Crystal Kairos of my own volition.
assumptions.assumption_2: I have access to a smartphone or computer and a stable internet connection to manage my account.
assumptions.assumption_3: I understand that membership requires integrity and commitment to cooperative principles.
assumptions.assumption_4: I have a valid email address and WhatsApp number for communication.
assumptions.assumption_5: I agree to receive communications regarding my savings and cooperative updates via email or WhatsApp.

review.before_declaration: I hereby declare that the information provided above is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge. I agree to abide by the
review.after_declaration: and Bylaws of Crystal Kairos Cooperative.
